captions_untagged.explicit: Being a trauma surgeon means making split-second decisions when absolutely everything is on the line. I couldn’t ask for better coworkers to stand beside me during these intense, high-stakes cases.
captions_untagged.moderate: The level of focus required under the bright lights of the operating room is absolutely unmatched. Just another intense shift doing what needs to be done.
captions_untagged.no_leak: The sheer concentration in the room during a complex procedure is palpable. Every single movement is precise and deliberate under the glare of the lights.
